resources.string: Please create a new user or select an existing one to see and manage your measurements.
Select the affected limbs and specify the amputation level for each.
No suitable reference persons available. Please create a user who does not use assisted weighing.
A reference person must be selected for assisted weighing.
This timestamp matches your last measurement. Please choose a different timestamp.
Add your first measurement to start tracking your progress.
No active measurement values for this entry.
No types available for setting goals.
Goal value cannot be empty for a new goal.
Please select a measurement type first.
Type \'%1$s\' updated and %2$s value(s) converted successfully.
Error converting values for type \'%1$s\'. The type definition was not updated.
Type \'%1$s\' updated. Unit changed, but no existing values required conversion.
Changing the unit for \'%1$s\' from %2$s to %3$s will convert all existing data points. This action may take some time and cannot be easily undone. Do you want to proceed?
This metric becomes read-only and auto-calculated. It updates when base values change. Applies to new or edited measurements; existing ones stay unchanged.
This metric is not auto-calculated. You can enter values manually.
A widely used population formula from 1991. Suited for general adult populations; may be less accurate for very lean or very muscular individuals.
Variant that adapts for younger users. A general-purpose estimate; athletic or atypical physiques can deviate.
Older regression with separate coefficients for men and women. Simple and fast but not tailored to special populations.
Reference model from 2000 for non-Asian populations. Useful baseline; accuracy varies across body types.
Companion model tuned for Asian populations. Use when this better matches the user’s background.
Classic total body water estimate. A simple approach; not individualized for athletes or edge cases.
TBW formula emphasizing body mass. Reasonable general estimate; precision varies with physique.
Common TBW model using height and weight, with sex-specific coefficients.
Later TBW estimate calibrated on Korean cohorts. Consider if that population match applies.
Lean body mass estimate popular in clinical settings. Sex-specific regression from height and weight.
Early LBM model. Simple and widely used; not tailored to very athletic builds.
Computes LBM as total weight minus fat mass derived from the chosen body-fat formula. Accuracy depends on the BF estimate.
Are you sure you want to %2$s %1$d item(s)?
Could not connect to scale, please ensure it is on.
No Bluetooth scale saved. Please add a scale in settings.
Please enable Bluetooth to start scanning.
Bluetooth permissions are required for scanning.
Bluetooth enabled, but permissions are still missing.
Bluetooth must be enabled to search for scales.
No devices found. Start a new scan.
Developer mode enabled. Please enable log file: Settings → General → Enable log file.
Developer mode enabled for this device. Please enable log file: Settings → General → Enable log file.
Developer mode is active — no measurements will be saved.
Please enable log file: Settings → General → Enable log file.
If a measurement is outside the tolerance for all users, it will not be saved.
Max. weight deviation to automatically assign to a user.
No additional special configuration available for this device.
The Xiaomi S400 scale requires a BLE bind key for decryption. Extract this key from Xiaomi Cloud using the Xiaomi Cloud Tokens Extractor tool.
Bind key must be exactly 32 hex characters
S400: Bind key not configured. Go to Bluetooth settings to enter your BLE key.
Driver for %1$s not found or internal error.
Measurement from %1$s cannot be assigned to a user.
No valid measurement values received from %1$s.
To search for scales, we need access to Bluetooth.
Please enable Bluetooth to search for scales.

openScale is an open-source project, and I don\'t own every scale. Please note that compatibility cannot be guaranteed in all cases, as Bluetooth protocols may change or be undocumented.\n\nAs an open-source project, pull requests and contributions to improve scale support are very welcome!
Unknown status or message from driver: %s
Adapter is already busy with another device (%s).
Error: Missing user data for selection.
Error: Invalid data received for consent.
Error: Missing data required for consent.
Error: Invalid data payload received for user interaction.
No data for %1$s in the selected range.
Please select measurement types for the chart.
No data to display or types to select.
No data available for the selected types.
No columns selected or no measurements available.
No data available for the current column selection.
All data for this user will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
This will remove the goal. Your measurement history will not be affected.
Are you sure you want to delete the measurement from %1$s (%2$s)? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete the selected item? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete the selected %1$d items? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete the custom type “%1$s”? All associated measurements will also be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
No other users available to change to.
Error changing user for some items.
No relevant measurement types available or configured for statistics.
When enabled, the app will save detailed logs locally on your device. These are useful for troubleshooting. The files may contain sensitive information. Only share them with trusted individuals.
Enabling logging will immediately start a new log session. A new log file will be created and the old one will be deleted.
No log file found to export.
No log file available to export.
No suitable app found to export the file.
Always create a new backup file
Location not configured. Automatic backups paused.
No application found to open the folder.
Folder selection cancelled. Automatic backup not enabled.
Are you sure you want to permanently delete ALL measurement data for user \"%1$s\"? This action cannot be undone.

This will IRREVERSIBLY delete ALL data for this app, including all users, settings, and measurement data. This action CANNOT be undone. Are you absolutely sure?\n\nAn app restart will be required after this action.
Are you sure you want to overwrite the current database with a backup? All current, unsaved data will be lost. The app may need to be restarted after the restore.
Are you sure you want to delete the entire database? This will remove ALL users and ALL data and cannot be undone.
Export not possible: No specific data fields defined for export.
No measurements available for this user to export.
No exportable measurement values found for this user.
Export failed: Could not create file.
"%1$d rows skipped due to missing dates."
"%1$d rows skipped due to date parsing errors."
"%1$d individual values could not be parsed."
No valid data found in the CSV file, or all rows contained errors.
Import failed: The mandatory column date is missing in the CSV header.
Import failed: Could not read the file.
No user data available to delete.
All measurement data for %1$s has been deleted.
No measurement data was found for %1$s.
Deletion process could not be started: No user selected.
Error: Database name could not be retrieved.
Error: Main database file \'%1$s\' not found.
Backup failed: Could not create backup file at the selected location.
Restore failed: Could not read the backup file.
Restore failed: Backup file is not a valid ZIP archive or is corrupted.
Restore failed: Essential database files not found in the backup.
Database successfully restored. Please restart the app.
No evaluation possible: No matching age band at the time of measurement.
Unusual value: outside the plausible range (%1$.0f–%2$.0f%%).
This scale has not been paired!\n\nHold the button on the bottom of the scale to switch it to pairing mode, and then reconnect to retrieve the device password.
Pairing succeeded!\n\nReconnect to retrieve measurement data.
Low battery level (%d%%), please recharge or replace scale batteries
Please step barefoot on the scale for reference measurements
Max. number of concurrent scale users reached
read/write openScale data, including user information and all saved measurements
Select your user from the list or create a new one.
Please enter the code displayed on your scale.
User list is empty or corrupted.
Error: User data could not be loaded correctly.
Please step barefoot on the scale
Using existing mapping: app user %1$d ↔ scale slot %2$d.
Please enter the consent code for slot %1$d.
No consent code available. Measurements can be read, but user settings cannot be changed.
For full functionality, create a new user on the scale.
Creating a new user on the scale…
No user mapping found; creating a new user on the scale…
Linked app user %1$d to scale slot %2$d.
Creating the user on the scale failed (code %1$d).
The scale has no free user slots. Delete a user on the device and try again.
Consent code was not accepted. Please check and try again.
Consent code not accepted. Please check and try again.
No Bluetooth adapter detected on this device.
Device not found. Make sure it is powered on and in range.
Using existing mapping for user %1$s to scale slot %2$s. Attempting auto-consent.
Invalid PIN format. Please enter a valid number.
Failed to register user on scale. Error: %1$s
Failed to confirm user on scale. Error: %1$s
Failed to retrieve user list from scale. Error: %1$s
User setup failed. Could not retrieve user list from scale.
Create new user on scale (UDS assigned slot)
Slot P%1$d: Used by %2$s (Select to take over?)
